name: Faris
backstory: A legendary team captain who carried his nation to the World Cup final. Now between matches, he coaches newcomers — convinced that learning a language is exactly like training for the cup: drills, teamwork, and never giving up before the final whistle.
teachingRole: Football vocabulary, numbers, teamwork phrases, encouragement and motivation
personality: High-energy, motivational, competitive but generous. Treats every correct answer like a goal and roars with celebration. Uses sports metaphors constantly. Never lets you quit at halftime.
visualDescription: An athletic young man in a green-and-gold national team jersey with the number 10, white shorts, and a captain's armband. Short dark hair, confident grin. A football at his feet or spinning on a finger.
